description_long: This object depicts a person seated in a wheelchair, wearing a blue and white checkered shirt and blue pants. The individual is positioned with hands resting on their lap, and the facial features are partially visible, though some areas are incomplete or distorted. The wheelchair frame and wheels are not clearly visible, making it difficult to discern specific wheelchair details. The figure appears to be male, with short dark hair, and is seated in a relaxed, upright posture. The overall form is somewhat fragmented, with missing or unclear sections, especially around the head and lower body. The asset is primarily composed of human features and clothing textures, with no obvious mobility aid accessories attached.
description: A person in a blue checkered shirt and blue pants is seated upright, hands on lap, in a wheelchair with incomplete visible details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, torso, and hands resting on their lap, with the checkered shirt clearly visible.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm, and the lap, with the shirt pattern and blue pants visible.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view with the back and side of the torso visible, but the head and wheelchair details are fragmented.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the side of the head, ear, and arm, with the hands on the lap and the lower body partially visible.
attribute_seating_posture: upright with hands resting on lap
